Question asks: What is the score at the end of the third quarter?

trace_inference_steps.text: The frame at 126.0s shows the end of the third quarter because the scoreboard reads 3rd and 0:00.0. In that same frame, BRISTOL CENT. has 52 and E. CATHOLIC has 40.
Since 52 is greater than 40, Bristol Central is leading East Catholic at the end of the third quarter.
The grounded scoreline is 52 to 40 with Bristol Central leading. None of the provided options matches that exact scoreline: A and C say 55 to 40, B says 52 to 52, and D and E say 64 to 32.

Comparing the verified scoreline to the listed choices: the visual evidence gives 52 to 40 with Bristol Central leading, while option A says 55 to 40, option B says 52 to 52 tied, option C says 55 to 40 with East Catholic leading, and options D and E say 64 to 32.
